chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No.D-4150 of 2023 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.19107/2023. 2. For hearing of main case. 01.09.2025 Syed Shoa-un-Nabi, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Ahmed Ali Ghumro, advocate for MDA. Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG. ------------- According to learned counsel for the petitioners the petitioners’ salary has been stopped by respondent No.3 / Malir Development Authority (MDA). This position is refuted by leaned counsel for MDA. However, learned counsel for the petitioners states that petitioners would be satisfied with order of this Court that if there are any pending salary outstanding against the petitioners, the MDA shall release the same to the petitioners within three months of the date of this order. Learned counsel for MDA and learned AAG have no objection to such proposition. Order accordingly. A copy of this order shall be sent to Secretary MDA for information and compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Shahzad Soomro
